---
title: "`r params$doc_title`"
subtitle: "`r params$doc_subtitle`"
author: "Biometrics Group, IRRI"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%Y %B %d')`"  
# date last modified: 2022 June 28
params:
  phenoDTfile: !r c("metjgwee88298")
  deregress: TRUE
  size: "std.error"
  color: "fieldinst"
  text: "geno"
  outputPath: !r here::here("Result")
  doc_title: "Visualization of predictions"
  doc_subtitle: "Version 2.1"
output: 
  html_document:
    toc: TRUE
    toc_depth: 4
    toc_float: 
      collapsed: FALSE
      smooth_scroll: FALSE
---

<style>
.main-container {
margin-left: 0;
margin-right: auto;
}
.tab-content {
margin-bottom: 50px;
}
</style>

```{r setup, include = FALSE}

# knitr R markdown chunk options
knitr::opts_chunk$set(dependson = knitr::all_labels(),
                      echo = FALSE,
                      cache = FALSE,
                      warning = FALSE,
                      message = FALSE,
                      comment = NA,
                      out.width = "100%",
                      error = TRUE)
options(knitr.kable.NA = '', knitr.duplicate.label = "allow")

# loading necessary R packages ####
## data manipulation
# library(dplyr)      # %>%, data cleaning functions
library(tidyr)      # pivot_()
# library(magrittr)   # %<>%, coerce col to factors or numeric
# library(stringr)    # str_detect()
# library(data.table) # %Like%
# library(scales)     # rescale data between to values
library(cgiarBase)

## outputs - graphs, tables
# library(ggplot2)    # ggplot(), etc.
# library(DT)         # datatable()
# library(knitr)      # kable()
library(kableExtra) # kable_styling(), etc.
# library(viridis)    # scale_fill_viridis()
# # library(gge)        # gge(), biplot()
# library(tidymodels) # for the fit() function
library(plotly)     # ggplotly()
# library(htmltools)  # tagList()

## parallel computing
# library(foreach)    # foreach(), %dopar%, etc.
# library(doParallel) # registerDoParallel()

```


```{r dataLoading, include = FALSE}
# loading the dataset
if (is.null(params$phenoDTfile)) stop("No input phenotypic data file specified.")
mydata <- read.csv(file.path("predictions.csv"))
useAna <- which(mydata$analysis.id %in% params$phenoDTfile)
if(length(useAna) == 0){stop("No predictions found under this phenoDTfile.", call. = FALSE)}
mydata <- mydata[useAna,]
mydata <- mydata[which(mydata$geno.type == "test"),]

```

*** 

```{r xxx, include = TRUE}
cat(paste("Analysing dataset with id(s):", paste(params$phenoDTfile, collapse = ", ")))

```

### Prediction scatterplots

Trait by trait scatterplot 

```{r visual2, results = 'asis'}
# , fig.dim = c(6, 12)
p2 <- list()
mydataSplit0 <- split(mydata, mydata$analysis.id)

for(kD in 1:length(mydataSplit0)){
  mydataSplit <- mydataSplit0[[kD]]
  mydataSplit$trait2 <- mydataSplit$trait
  trait2 <- unique(mydataSplit$trait2)
  
  combos <- expand.grid(trait2,trait2)
  combos <- combos[!duplicated(t(apply(combos,1,sort))),]
  combos <- combos[-which(combos[,1] == combos[,2]),]
  
  if(nrow(combos) > 0){
    listTrace <- buttons <- list()
  
  tt <- rep(FALSE, nrow(combos)); 
  tt2 <- rep(TRUE, nrow(combos));
  buttons[[1]] <- list(
    args = list("visible", tt2), 
    label = "All", 
    method = "restyle"
  )
  
  for(j in 1:nrow(combos)){
    
    listTrace[[j]] <- list(
      line = list(
        color = "#FFD700", 
        width = 3
      ), 
      name = paste0("X-AX: ",as.character(combos[j,1]), " | Y-AX: ", as.character(combos[j,2])), 
      type = "scatter", 
      x = mydataSplit[which(mydataSplit$trait2 == as.character(combos[j,1])),"predicted.value"], 
      y = mydataSplit[which(mydataSplit$trait2 == as.character(combos[j,2])),"predicted.value"],
      text=mydataSplit[which(mydataSplit$trait2 == as.character(combos[j,2])),params$text],
      size=1/scale(mydataSplit[which(mydataSplit$trait2 == as.character(combos[j,2])),params$size]),
      color=mydataSplit[which(mydataSplit$trait2 == as.character(combos[j,2])),params$color]
    )
    tt2 <- tt
    tt2[j] <- TRUE
    buttons[[j+1]] <- list(
      args = list("visible", tt2), 
      label = paste0("X-AX: ",as.character(combos[j,1]), " | Y-AX: ", as.character(combos[j,2])), 
      method = "restyle"
    )
    
  }
  layout <- list(
    #title = "Predictions scatterplot (2-traits)", 
    xaxis = list(domain = c(0.1, 1), title="Prediction value X-AX"),
    yaxis = list(title = "Prediction value Y-AX"),
    updatemenus = list(
      list(
        x = 0.65, 
        y = 1.5, 
        buttons = buttons, 
        yanchor = "top"
      )
    )
  )
  
  p <- plot_ly()
  for(j in 1:nrow(combos)){ # line=listTrace[[j]]$line,  , text=listTrace[[j]]$text
    p <- add_markers(p, name=listTrace[[j]]$name, type=listTrace[[j]]$type, x=listTrace[[j]]$x, 
                     y=listTrace[[j]]$y, #showlegend = FALSE,
                     text=listTrace[[j]]$text, 
                     size=listTrace[[j]]$size, 
                     color=listTrace[[j]]$color)
  }
  p <- layout(p, title=layout$title, updatemenus=layout$updatemenus,
              xaxis = layout$xaxis,# height=1000,
              yaxis = layout$yaxis
  )
  p2[[kD]] <- p
  }
  
}
if(length(p2) > 0){
  subplot(p2, nrows=length(p2))#, heights = c(0.6, 0.4))
}

```

### Genetic gain summary

```{r dataChecking, include=TRUE}
mydata$trait <- paste(mydata$trait,mydata$fieldinst,mydata$analysis.id,sep="_")
trait <- unique(mydata$trait)

if(params$deregress){
  mydata$predicted.value.d <- mydata$predicted.value/mydata$rel
}else{
  mydata$predicted.value.d <- mydata$predicted.value
}


r2 <- pval <- b0 <- b1 <- b1p <- numeric()
for(j in 1:length(trait)){ # for loop for genetic gain regressions
  mod <- lm(mydata[which(mydata$trait == trait[j]),"predicted.value.d"] ~ mydata[which(mydata$trait == trait[j]),"geno.year.origin"])
  sm <- summary(mod)
  baseline <- mod$coefficients[1] + mod$coefficients[2]*min(mydata[which(mydata$trait == trait[j]),"geno.year.origin"])
  b1p[j] <- round((mod$coefficients[2]/baseline) * 100,3)
  r2[j] <- round(sm$r.squared,3)
  b1[j] <- round(mod$coefficients[2],3 )
  b0[j] <- round(mod$coefficients[1],3 )
  pval[j] <- round(1 - pf(sm$fstatistic[1], df1=sm$fstatistic[2], df2=sm$fstatistic[3]) ,4)
}
summaryInfo2 <- tribble(
  ~cat, ~val,
  "**Trait**", paste(trait, collapse = ", "),
  "**% Genetic gain**", paste0(b1p, collapse = ", "),
  "**R2**", paste0(r2, collapse = ", "),
  "**Intercept**", paste0(b0, collapse = ", "),
  "**Slope**", paste0(b1, collapse = ", "),
  "**P-value**", paste0(pval, collapse = ", ")
  
)
names(summaryInfo2) <- c("", "")
kable(summaryInfo2) %>% kable_styling(full_width = F)

```

### Prediction vs Year-of-origin plots

Using predictions across environments regressed on the year of origin. 

```{r visual, results = 'asis'}
listTrace <- buttons <- list()
tt <- rep(FALSE, length(trait)); names(tt) <- trait

tt2 <- rep(TRUE, length(trait));
buttons[[1]] <- list(
  args = list("visible", tt2), 
  label = "All", 
  method = "restyle"
)
for(j in 1:length(trait)){
  
  mod <- lm(mydata[which(mydata$trait == trait[j]),"predicted.value.d"] ~ mydata[which(mydata$trait == trait[j]),"geno.year.origin"])
  sm <- summary(mod)
  baseline <- mod$coefficients[1] + mod$coefficients[2]*min(mydata[which(mydata$trait == trait[j]),"geno.year.origin"])
  ggp <- (mod$coefficients[2]/baseline) * 100
  mt <- paste("R2=",round(sm$r.squared,3),":B1%=",round(ggp,3),": B1=",round(mod$coefficients[2],3 ),": B0=",round(mod$coefficients[1],3 ))
  
  listTrace[[j]] <- list(
    line = list(
      color = "#FFD700", 
      width = 3
    ), 
    name = trait[j], 
    type = "box", 
    x = mydata[which(mydata$trait == trait[j]),"geno.year.origin"], 
    y = mydata[which(mydata$trait == trait[j]),"predicted.value.d"],
    text=mt
  )
  tt2 <- tt
  tt2[j] <- TRUE
  buttons[[j+1]] <- list(
    args = list("visible", tt2), 
    label = trait[j], 
    method = "restyle"
  )
  
}
layout <- list(
  title = "Predictions across years", 
  xaxis = list(domain = c(0.1, 1), title="Year of origin"),
  yaxis = list(title = "Prediction value"),
  updatemenus = list(
    list(
      x = 0.45, 
      y = 1.5, 
      buttons = buttons, 
      yanchor = "top"
    )
  )
)

p <- plot_ly()
for(j in 1:length(trait)){
  p <- add_boxplot(p, line=listTrace[[j]]$line, name=listTrace[[j]]$name, type=listTrace[[j]]$type, x=listTrace[[j]]$x, y=listTrace[[j]]$y, text=listTrace[[j]]$text)
}
p <- layout(p, title=layout$title, updatemenus=layout$updatemenus)
p

```
